MOTION **JOINT** PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITE, WILDA L. ON BEHALF OF HERSELF AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED HEARING SET FOR SEP-07-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WILDA WHITE'S **JOINT** MOTION PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. THE SETTLEMENT APPEARS TO BE WITHIN THE RANGE OF POSSIBLE FINAL APPROVAL. THE FINAL APPROVAL HEARING WILL BE NOVEMBER 13, 2012 AT 9:30AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. COUNSEL ARE REQUESTED TO REVISE THE PROPOSED ORDER TO ELIMINATE THE BACKGROUND SECTION AND ALL CITATIONS TO AUTHORITY AND ALSO TO SIGNIFICANTLY REDUCE THE FACTUAL FINDINGS SO THAT THE ORDER CONTAINS ONLY THE INFORMATION NEEDED FOR SUCH AN ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

LAW AND MOTION 302, FINAL APPROVAL HEARING RE: CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 30, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. THE RECORD REFLECTS THAT THERE WERE NO OBJECTIONS IN COURT OR ANY OTHER FORM WERE RECEIVED BY THE CLASS ADMINISTRATOR. PROPOSED ORDERS AS TO THE PRELIMINARY APPROVAL AS WELL AS TO THE ORDER GRANTING FINAL APPROVAL AND JUDGMENT WERE LODGED IN COURT. MOTION **Joint** Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Sep-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WILDA WHITE's **Joint** MOTION Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is Granted. The settlement appears to be within the range of possible final approval. The final approval hearing will be November 13, 2012 at 9:30am in department 302. Counsel are requested to revise the proposed order to eliminate the background section and all citations to authority and also to significantly reduce the factual findings so that the order contains only the information needed for such an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
